hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"PRESERVE across compaction: (1) Current task and what remains to be done. (2) Files modified in this session and WHY. (3) Any user feedback or corrections given. (4) Test results — which passed, which failed, what was fixed. (5) Directory structure decisions (teach/ family subdirs, demos/ subdirs)."}}'
